verified_claims: SQLite remains the default lane for filesystem state_db paths; Postgres is selected only for postgres/postgresql DSNs.
Postgres lane carries a partial unique idempotency_token index over active workflow jobs.
Live Postgres test proves eight concurrent submissions with one token create exactly one active job and all callers reattach to the same job_id.
Live Postgres test proves concurrent SKIP LOCKED claimers receive disjoint job batches with no double-claim.
Catch-up in the Postgres lane uses run-local event_id plus previous_event_id rather than one global required ordering counter.
Alembic upgrade and downgrade were executed on a throwaway Postgres database.
